title: Parenting | #shorts
full_text: okay you don't need any other therapist I can fix whatever your problem is there's just so many times in our lives where you want to do something and our mom is just so controlling she doesn't let us play sports she doesn't let us go out this is the problem you are in Bad Company your mom I happen to know her she's actually a ray of sunshine you look very healthy you look fit you're going to a good college how come she doesn't let us go anywhere then because you she's trying to probably keep you safe she's a responsible she's always talking our location always I turned off my location once and I had 14 Miss calls that's right why did you turn off your location where were you you're not my mom why are you asking oh sorry your mom would was probably worried that you are at somebody's house Jennifer and Susie I feel like the issue is more from the parenting side it's just my own perspective okay there's your other major problem you should never have a perspective
